scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every documented Employee Learning Cloud (ELC) endpoint under /api/v1 is enumerated below (verified against developers.workramp.com/llms.txt's full reference index and each endpoint's OpenAPI definition). This is a private API (developers.workramp.com's Getting Started page: 'Contact support@workramp.com to see if you are eligible'). Legacy's base_url (api.workramp.com) does not match the real documented host (app.workramp.com, or app.eu.workramp.com for EU customers); this bundle corrects it. The separate customer-facing Academy surface (/api/v1/academies/{academy_id}/...: contacts, certifications, paths, events, segments) is a DIFFERENT product surface (customer/partner training, not employee training) and is out of scope for this migration, which targets ELC only, matching legacy's users/groups/courses framing.
